name_en: 🆕【Top Quality】M12839 Green👏👏A cardholder with a dignified expression made of Monogram Maccasse (one of Mason's classic canvases). The casual color accents are its charm. The dyed denim leather strap at the top and the matching lining add unexpected twists. Dimensions: 11 x 7 x 1.5 cm.
